Entries.Text: Program Language
The language used to localize all of the text within Smithbox.
Check for new versions of Smithbox during startup
When enabled Smithbox will automatically check for new versions upon program start.
Ignore Read Asserts
If enabled, when attempting to read files, asserts will be ignored.
Use DCX Heuristic on Read
If enabled, if a DCX fails to read its compression type, use a heuristic to guess which it should be instead.
Rendering Backend
Determines which rendering backend to use. Restart is required for changes to take affect.
Enable Event Log
If enabled, the event logger will be visible in the menu bar.
Event Visibility Duration

The number of frames for which the event logger message stays visible in the menu bar.
Also determines the time it takes for messages to fade colors.
-1 means the message never disappears or fades.
Enable Error Log
If enabled, the error logger will be visible in the menu bar.
Error Visibility Duration

The number of frames for which the error logger message stays visible in the menu bar.
Also determines the time it takes for messages to fade colors.
-1 means the message never disappears or fades.
Enable Log Message Color Fade
If enabled, log messages will slowly fade from their original color to a faded color.
Log Popups
If enabled, high priority log messages will cause a popup message box to appear.
Enable Scope Logging
If enabled, the scope the log message is sent from is included in the log message.
Enable Developer Tools
Enables various tools meant for Smithbox developers only.
Smithbox Build Folder
Select the build directory for Smithbox (where the Smithbox.sln is placed).
